commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=88b539ebbc3c21ec0b209420e2bb5275809eafd2)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds structured doctor health findings and dry-run repair effects for legacy session transcripts and stale session snapshot paths, plus focused tests and contribution registration.

PR surface: Source +190, Tests +97. Total +287 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: default `doctor --lint` collects contribution health checks and exits nonzero for warning findings, so adding these warning checks changes lint behavior for persisted session artifact states.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The protected label plus default-lint compatibility choice require maintainer review rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: Doctor: expose session artifact findings
target.body:
## Summary

- Exposes legacy session transcript state as structured Doctor findings.
- Exposes stale cached session snapshot paths as structured Doctor findings.
- Adds dry-run repair effects for transcript rewrites and snapshot path rewrites.
- Keeps the existing legacy Doctor `run` paths authoritative for real `doctor` / `doctor --fix` mutations.
- Does not add or change config, plugin, or public SDK contract surface.

This is intentionally the next narrow session-artifacts slice before returning to the broader dry-run preview PR. It does not change transcript repair behavior, snapshot repair behavior, session store target resolution, or the public health-check contract.

## Stack

Rebased onto current `main` at `7668a72843d8437e193e0c3ed2467f88a8741512`. Current branch head is `88b539ebbc` (`feat(doctor): expose session artifact findings`).

## Validation

Current head `88b539ebbc`:

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/commands/doctor-session-transcripts.test.ts src/commands/doctor-session-snapshots.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=dot` - 76 tests passed across 2 Vitest shards
- `node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint src/commands/doctor-session-transcripts.ts src/commands/doctor-session-transcripts.test.ts src/commands/doctor-session-snapshots.ts src/commands/doctor-session-snapshots.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check src/commands/doctor-session-transcripts.ts src/commands/doctor-session-transcripts.test.ts src/commands/doctor-session-snapshots.ts src/commands/doctor-session-snapshots.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node node_modules/@typescript/native-preview/bin/tsgo.js -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo --declaration false --singleThreaded --checkers 1`
- `node node_modules/@typescript/native-preview/bin/tsgo.js -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-src.tsbuildinfo --declaration false --singleThreaded --checkers 1`
- `node scripts/plugin-sdk-surface-report.mjs --check`
- `git diff --check`

## Notes

The local commit was made with `--no-verify` because this fresh worktree uses a symlinked dependency tree that has direct `oxfmt` / `oxlint` binaries available but lacks `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt`, which the hook expects. The exact lint, format, type, SDK-surface, and focused test gates above passed after the commit contents were finalized and again after rebasing onto current `main`.
target.author: giodl73-repo
